## Problem
What problem does this feature solve? <!-- e.g., "I'm always frustrated when..." -->

## Proposed Solution
What should happen? Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered
What alternatives have you considered?

## Implementation Notes
If you have thoughts on how this could be implemented:
- Relevant spec section (if any)
- Architecture impact
- Extension or core change?

## Additional Context
Any context, screenshots, or examples that help explain the feature.
